headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Research Further and 2 We Ignore
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on United Rentals, Raises Price Target to $1421
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jamie Cook   maintains United Rentals (NYSE:URI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $1209 to $1421.
